titleStmt.title: Letter from Joseph E. Devlin to the Urban District Council, Longford, 11 May 1916
Letters 1916-1923
titleStmt.author: Joseph E. Devlin

editionStmt.p: This work was originally published by Maynooth University in Ireland in 2017. In 2026 this data, stored in a relational database was extracted and converted into this TEI/XML document.

availability.p: This is an open access work licensed under Creative Commons Attribution NonCommercial 4.0 International license (CC BY-NC 4.0).

note.p: Letter from Joseph E. Devlin, assistant secretary to the Local Government Board, to the Longford Urban District Council concerning the Housing of the Working Classes (Ireland) Act 1908.

projectDesc.p: The data in these XML files was generated based on a data dump from the Magellan database (https://github.com/Maynooth-Center-for-Digital-Humanities/Magellan). Each database record has been converted to a JSON file (https://github.com/letters1916static/letters-data/tree/main/json). The element section of the JSON file contains the TEI-encoded contents of the letters. The TEI XML has been cleaned and made well-formed using a Python script (https://github.com/letters1916static/letters-data/tree/main/src).

body.ab:
Local for Board Dublin 11 th May 1916 Sir â Adverting to the Certificate forwarded
in the Board's letter of the 10 th ultimo, made in
persuance of the provisions of Section 5 of the Housing
of the Working Classes (Ireland) 1908, I am
directed by the Local for Board for Ireland, to
inform the Layford Urban Dist Council that a
sum of Â£6,133:13:4 in Standing to the Credit of the
Housing Fund on the 31 st of March last is available
for distribution in respect of Â£33.61:19:3 the
total liabilities of local authorities under the
section referred to â The proportion amount of the Fund payable
to the Urban District Council in respect of the
liabilities incurred by them is therefore Â£62:14:3 Instructions have been given for the payment of that
amount to the Treasurer for the Local Authority. I am Sir
Your obed t Serv t J E Devlin Ass t Secty The Clerk Urban Dist Council Longford
